metadata.description: A curated collection of Claude Code plugins for professional workflows

plugins.name: agentic-harness
plugins.description: Stand up, assess, and maintain an agentic harness in an existing repo — generate project-specific agent teams and the skills they use, then assess how effectively they are used

plugins.name: developer-tools
plugins.description: Developer environment tooling — devcontainer generation, stack detection, infrastructure config

plugins.name: human-resources
plugins.description: HR interview workflow — job descriptions, candidate pre-screening, interview preparation, evaluation, compliance checking, and methodology guidance

plugins.name: kaizen
plugins.description: Continuous improvement loops — a generic recursive optimization engine with bundled profiles for Claude Code usage, code refactoring, and process improvement

plugins.name: plantuml
plugins.description: Authoring, rendering, and maintenance of PlantUML diagrams — policy-driven projects with multi-target rendering, lint, validate, review, advisor, and migrate

plugins.name: project-management
plugins.description: SOW writing, review, estimation, and PMI-compliant PERT analysis — an integrated project management pipeline

plugins.name: tech-writing
plugins.description: Technical writing support — documentation structure, style guides, content review
